name: Gobi Dal- Lentils with Cauliflower
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils well and drain.
2. Heat ghee or oil in a large saucepan.
3. Fry onions until soft.
4. Add chili, pepper, cumin, coriander, and turmeric; stir for 30 seconds.
5. Add lentils and lemon juice. Stir to coat each grain.
6. Cut cauliflower into small florets and add to the pan.
7. Add chicken stock and coconut. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 20 minutes.
8. Mix flour with some liquid to form a smooth paste. Stir into the saucepan.
9. Add salt and cashews. Cook an additional 5-10 minutes until lentils have formed a thick sauce.
10. Serve hot with plain boiled rice.
